title: Logistics Dispatch Specialist
description: Manage dispatch operations for U.S.-based freight and logistics clients. Coordinate shipments, communicate with drivers, and ensure on-time delivery performance.
requirements: 2+ years experience in logistics or freight dispatch
Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)
Ability to work U.S. business hours

title: Customer Service Representative — Freight
description: Provide exceptional customer support to shippers and carriers. Handle inquiries, resolve issues, and proactively communicate shipment status updates.
requirements: 1+ years in customer service, logistics experience preferred
Comfortable with CRM and ticketing systems
Available for overlapping U.S. time zone hours

title: Billing & Invoicing Specialist
description: Process freight invoices, reconcile billing discrepancies, and manage accounts receivable for logistics clients. Accuracy and attention to detail are critical.
requirements: 2+ years in billing, invoicing, or accounts receivable
Experience in logistics or transportation industry preferred
Proficiency in Excel and accounting software

title: Data Entry & Track-and-Trace Operator
description: Enter shipment data into TMS systems, track shipment progress, and update clients and internal teams on delivery status. High volume, high accuracy.
requirements: Experience with data entry or back-office operations
Comfortable working with multiple systems simultaneously

title: Team Lead — Logistics Operations
description: Lead a team of offshore logistics specialists. You'll bridge U.S. client expectations with global team execution, manage performance, and drive continuous improvement.
requirements: Experience managing remote or offshore teams
